title: Fractured Arcana Card
description: Schema for card JSON files in Data/Cards/. Validates card structure, halves, targeting, and effects.

id.description: Unique card identifier. Convention: schoolname_cardname in lowercase with underscores.

name.description: Display name shown in the UI.

school.description: Wizard school this card belongs to. Must match the CardSchool enum exactly.

status.description:
Controls whether this card is loaded into the game. Required on every card — no card may exist without a declared status.

  'ready' — Fully built and integrated. Loads into CardDatabase normally. Appears in CardLibrary and is draftable.
  'wip'   — Built but not yet balanced or fully tested. Loads only when DevMode is enabled in CardLoaderV2. Does not appear in CardLibrary.
  'stub'  — Placeholder only. Never loaded regardless of build mode. Effect chains may be empty or missing.

CardHalf.description: One playable half of a card (top or bottom).

mana.description: Mana cost to play this half.

speed.description: When this half can be played.

rules_text.description: Human-readable description of the effect shown on the card.

tags.description: Element and school tags read at cast time by attunement, buff systems, and targeting selectors. Required on every half — use an empty array [] for halves with no elemental or school identity. Tag strings are open-ended; new schools and mechanics will introduce new values over time without requiring schema changes.

requires.description: Pre-cast validation checks. Card cannot be played unless all conditions are met.

channel.description: Optional channeled version of this half. Played as a Reaction in response to the base half.

ChannelVariant.description: The channeled variant of a card half. Same structure as CardHalf but nested and optional.

tags.description: Element and school tags. Required — use [] if this channel variant has no elemental identity.

Targeting.description: Targeting strategy for this card half.

type.description: Targeting strategy. Must match a key registered in CardScriptRegistry.RegisterBuiltins() under RegisterTargeter. Adding a new value requires both a runtime factory and an entry in this enum.

range.description: Maximum tile distance from caster the target may sit at. Used by: unit, tile, cone, nearest_to_target, element_tile, empty_tile.

radius.description: Radius (in tiles) of the area-of-effect. Used by: aoe, ring.

length.description: Length (in tiles) of a line target. Used by: line.

enemies_only.description: Restrict the selection to enemy-controlled units. Used by: unit, aoe, cone, line, by_tag.

los.description: Require line of sight from caster to target. Used by: unit.

include_tiles.description: Include empty hex tiles (not just units) in the selection. Used by: aoe, ring, line, adjacent_to_target.

element.description: Element key used to filter tiles. Used by: element_tile.

tag.description: Tag key (e.g. 'fire', 'undead') used to filter units. Used by: by_tag.

Effect.description: An effect node — leaf or composite. Must always have a non-empty 'type'. An effect object with no type or with type:'' is invalid and will be flagged here before it silently becomes an EmptyEffect at runtime. If an effect is not yet authored, mark the card status as 'stub' or 'wip' rather than leaving type blank.

type.description: Effect type key. Lowercase. Must be registered in CardScriptRegistry.RegisterBuiltins().

amount.description: Generic magnitude. Used by: damage, heal, shield, armor, grant_armor, mana_gain, self_damage, remove_armor.

radius.description: Radius (in tiles) of an area effect. Used by: aoe_all, imbue_area, consume_element_tile, terraform, elemental_convergence, primordial_surge, tectonic_shatter, create_maelstrom, cataclysm.

damage.description: Per-hit damage figure for effects that pair area with a damage value. Used by: aoe_all, consume_element_tile, terraform, create_maelstrom.

damage_per_element.description: Damage dealt per unique element present. Used by: ragnarok.

damage_per_tile.description: Damage dealt per affected tile. Used by: tectonic_shatter, cataclysm, push_damage.

bonus_damage.description: Bonus damage modifier. Used by: imbue_tile, avatar_transform.

element.description: Element key (fire, ice, storm, stone, etc.). Used by: imbue_tile, imbue_area, imbue_path, consume_element_tile.

tiles.description: Tiles to push or move. NOTE: this is 'tiles' not 'amount' — a common typo source. Used by: move, push, push_damage.

collision_damage.description: Bonus damage dealt when a pushed unit collides with an obstacle. Used by: push.

turns.description: Duration in turns. Used by: avatar_transform, create_maelstrom.

bonus_speed.description: Bonus movement speed. Used by: avatar_transform.

armor.description: Armor to grant. Used by: avatar_transform.

freezes.description: When true, the effect also applies the 'frozen' status. Used by: create_maelstrom.

half_to_allies.description: When true, allies take half the damage the enemies take. Used by: ragnarok.

move.description: Tiles to move during an imbued path. Used by: imbue_path.

armor_per_tile.description: Armor granted per tile of imbued movement. Used by: imbue_path.

count.description: Number of items to produce. Used by: draw (cards drawn), summon (units summoned).

unit.description: Identifier of the unit kind to summon. Resolved at runtime against the summon registry. Used by: summon.

min.description: Minimum damage floor. Used by: damage_by_distance.

max.description: Maximum damage ceiling. Used by: damage_by_distance.

per_tile.description: Damage added per tile of distance. Used by: damage_by_distance.

height.description: Height (in tile units) to raise terrain to. Used by: raise_terrain.

attunement_set_to.description: Target attunement counter value the effect snaps the caster to. Used by: elemental_convergence. See README §7 — distinct from the deprecated 'attunement_counters' field.

tiles_per_draw.description: Tiles affected per card drawn. Used by: cataclysm.

attunement_counters.description: DEPRECATED — was used by an older form of elemental_convergence. Use 'attunement_set_to' instead. Retained in the schema only because one legacy card still references it; the runtime ignores this field.

cards_per_tiles.description: DEPRECATED — no runtime effect reads this field. Retained only because one legacy card still references it. Likely meant to be 'tiles_per_draw' on cataclysm.

status.description: Status effect to apply. Used by: apply_status.

steps.description: Ordered child effects. Used by: sequence.

Predicate.description: A boolean condition for use in conditional effects. The 'type' string must be registered in CardScriptRegistry.RegisterBuiltins() under RegisterPredicate.

type.description: Predicate kind. Registered values include: always_true, was_lethal, target_on_tile, target_adjacent_to_tile, target_adjacent_to_caster, caster_on_terrain, has_elements_near_caster.

tile.description: Tile-type key the predicate checks against. Used by: target_on_tile, target_adjacent_to_tile.

terrain.description: Terrain-type key the predicate checks the caster's footing against. Used by: caster_on_terrain.

elements.description: List of element keys to look for near the caster. Used by: has_elements_near_caster.

range.description: Search radius in tiles. Used by: has_elements_near_caster.

element.description: Reserved for predicates that filter by a single element. Currently unused by any registered predicate; retained for forward compatibility.

status.description: Reserved for predicates that test status presence. Currently unused by any registered predicate; retained for forward compatibility.

element_tag.description: Reserved for predicates that filter by element tag. Currently unused by any registered predicate; retained for forward compatibility.

threshold.description: Reserved for predicates that compare against a numeric threshold (e.g. attunement >= n). Currently unused by any registered predicate.
